import sys
print('Python version:', sys.version, flush=True)
print('Testing torch...', flush=True)
import torch
print('torch OK, cuda:', torch.cuda.is_available(), flush=True)
print('Testing torch_geometric...', flush=True)
from torch_geometric.data import Data, Batch
print('Data/Batch OK', flush=True)
from torch_geometric.nn import global_mean_pool
print('global_mean_pool OK', flush=True)
from torch_geometric.nn import GINEConv
print('GINEConv OK', flush=True)
from torch_geometric.nn import BatchNorm
print('BatchNorm OK', flush=True)
print('All imports OK!', flush=True)
